description: Crystal Raiders Patch 1 (24 January 2024) — Combat Balance Changes (Bows, Crossbows, Cursed Staffs, Fire Staffs, Frost Staffs, Shapeshifter Staffs, Spears, War Gloves, Shoes), Fixes.

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Bows Rain of Arrows Longbow Crossbows Sweeping Bolt Heavy Crossbow hitbox Cursed Staffs Dark Matter Enfeeble Blades Lifecurse Staff Fire Staffs Flaming Phoenix Dawnsong Frost Staffs Ice Shard Shapeshifter Staffs Energy Regeneration Distortion Sinister Swipe Prowling Staff Hellfire Barrage Hellspawn Staff Powerful Impact Earthrune Staff Spears Breakthrough Daybreaker War Gloves Infernal Boulder Hellfire Hands Shoes Hover Sandals of Purity Frost Walk Druid Sandals

subsections.heading: Bows
subsections.searchable_text: Bows Rain of Arrows Longbow Damage 90 99

subsections.heading: Crossbows
subsections.searchable_text: Crossbows Sweeping Bolt Heavy Crossbow projectile hitbox increased

changes.raw_text: Sweeping Bolt: Slightly increased the projectile hitbox

subsections.heading: Cursed Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Cursed Staffs Dark Matter Damage vs Players 73 78 vs Mobs 36.7 39 Enfeeble Blades Lifecurse Staff Channel Tick Interval 0.5s 0.75s Damage per Tick 33 55 Damage Debuff per Tick 4% 5% stacks 5

changes.raw_text: Dark Matter: Damage vs Players: 73 → 78; Damage vs Mobs: 36.7 → 39
Enfeeble Blades: Channel Tick Interval: 0.5s → 0.75s (enemies still immune to buffs between ticks); Damage per Tick: 33 → 55; Damage Debuff per Tick: 4% → 5% (stacks up to 5 times)
notes: Enemies are still immune to buffs between ticks

subsections.heading: Fire Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Fire Staffs Flaming Phoenix Dawnsong Fixed missing AoE Escalation

changes.raw_text: Flaming Phoenix: Fixed missing AoE Escalation

subsections.heading: Shapeshifter Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Shapeshifter Staffs Energy Regeneration Factor 4.5 3 Distortion Damage 70 60 Slow Strength 20% 10% Sinister Swipe Prowling Staff 90 76 Hellfire Barrage Hellspawn Staff Damage per Tick 32 30 Powerful Impact Earthrune Staff 65 40

subsections.heading: War Gloves
subsections.searchable_text: War Gloves Infernal Boulder Hellfire Hands 1st Bounce 220.5 210 2nd 147 140 3rd 73.5 70

changes.raw_text: Infernal Boulder: 1st Boulder Bounce: 220.5 → 210; 2nd Boulder Bounce: 147 → 140; 3rd Boulder Bounce: 73.5 → 70

subsections.heading: Shoes
subsections.searchable_text: Shoes Hover Sandals of Purity Move speed 50% 60% Frost Walk Druid Sandals 55% 60%

sections.heading: Fixes
items: The Heretic Warsteed mount skin is now tradable on the Marketplace
Fixed issue where activities selected in the Guild Finder were ignored when searching
Fixed issue where guild names and item names were not clickable in ingame mails
Fixed issue where zerg and tutorial markers on the minimap had a thicker than intended border
Fixed issue where zerg markers would appear on minimaps of multiple regions when accessed via the world map
Fixed issue where Settings menu could not be opened with ESC key
Fixed issue where mob camp completion rates in the Mists were not displaying on the region map
Fixed issue where character nametags would sometimes not display correctly
[Mobile] Fixed issue where Destiny Board node UIs would run past screen edge
[Mobile] Fixed issue where virtual joystick was sometimes offset
[Mobile] Fixed issue where control settings would not update the spell button layout when set to Tap Controls and 'spells on bottom'
[Controller] Fixed issue where Inventory could not be opened via button press
[Mobile / Controller] Fixed issue where spells could not be cast while transformed by Shapeshifter Weapons or in vanity mode
Additional minor graphical, animation, terrain, UI, and localization fixes
